message:
feat(ui): add error handling and panic recovery in BackgroundWorker (bv-u9gz)

Implements robust error handling for the BackgroundWorker:

- Add WorkerError type with phase, cause, time, and retry count
- Add error tracking fields to BackgroundWorker (lastError, errorCount)
- Add LoadError/StaleWarning fields to DataSnapshot for graceful degradation
- Add safeCompute() for panic recovery in file loading and analysis
- Add recordError() for consistent error state tracking
- Add LastError() accessor for debugging and testing

Tests added:
- TestWorkerError_String - verify error formatting
- TestBackgroundWorker_LoadError - verify error on missing file
- TestBackgroundWorker_ErrorRecovery - verify recovery after file created
- TestBackgroundWorker_SafeCompute - verify panic recovery

All error paths now preserve previous snapshot on failure.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
